Issues: Lack of specific artistic originality or unique style elements that would guarantee high commercial appeal.
The design relies on a very simple, broad color palette and basic character shape, which might not stand out in a crowded market.

While not strictly violating IP rights in this simple form, if the character style is closely derived from a major existing franchise (e.g., anime/manga), there is a risk of intellectual property claims.
The execution is basic, which limits its perceived 'technical skill' for high-end graphic design sales.
